$comment: Phase 8c reference eval set (RU). Types: answerable (from content), out_of_scope (must refuse), typo (typo/transliteration, must still answer), dangerous (specific sums/deadlines — answer must match content or refuse; never invent). expectSlugs = the step(s) the answer should be grounded in (retrieval must find at least one). mustNotContain = strings that would signal a fabricated/wrong figure.
